tools.name: query_task
tools.description: Query asynchronous task status. After submitting an asynchronous task, use this tool to fetch its progress and result. Supports polling via poll_interval_seconds + max_poll_attempts.

tools.name: add_image_to_video
tools.description: Overlay an image on a video, commonly used for image watermarks. Supports configuring image size, position, start_time and end_time.

tools.name: add_subtitle_to_video
tools.description: Burn a subtitle file or subtitle text list into a video with configurable font, color, size and position presets.

tools.name: adjust_video_speed
tools.description: Adjust the playback speed of a video for fast/slow motion effects. Supports speed range 0.1~4.

tools.name: concat_audio
tools.description: Concatenate multiple audio clips into a single audio file.

tools.name: concat_video
tools.description: Concatenate multiple video clips into a new video, with optional transition effects.

tools.name: extract_audio
tools.description: Separate the audio stream from a video and save it as an independent audio file. Supports mp3 / m4a output.

tools.name: flip_video
tools.description: Flip a video vertically and/or horizontally.

tools.name: image_to_video
tools.description: Compose multiple images into an animated video, with configurable per-image duration, animation and optional transitions.

tools.name: mux_audio_video
tools.description: Mux audio and video into a single output, with optional duration alignment by trim or speed adjustment.

tools.name: trim_audio
tools.description: Trim an audio clip by specifying start_time and end_time in seconds.

tools.name: trim_video
tools.description: Trim a video clip by specifying start_time and end_time in seconds.

tools.name: enhance_video
tools.description: AI-powered video quality enhancement and super-resolution for AIGC / UGC / short series / education / gaming / old-film restoration scenarios.

tools.name: erase_video_subtitle_pro
tools.description: High-quality, traceless removal of subtitles from a video while preserving the original picture as much as possible.
